title: mlip-dynamic-stability: a finite-temperature dynamic-stability benchmark of foundation MLIPs
description: Code, curated reference set, and per-unit results ledger for the paper 'Finite-temperature dynamic stability is a blind spot of foundation machine-learning interatomic potentials'. Benchmarks five foundation MLIPs (MACE-MP-0, CHGNet, ORB-v2, SevenNet-0, MatterSim) on the harmonic-unstable to finite-T-stabilised regime, introduces a single-mode quantum soft-mode free-energy screen, and cross-validates against multi-mode SSCHA.
